creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

This port also needs to be converted to staging.

I'm working on this but found it's not as easy as it looks, mainly due 
to its use of xdg-utils.

I'll followup with an update patch as soon as I have something working.

Also, ports/184182 was submitted with a different change in the 
src/calibre/constants.py file, regarding qthack.

Can you analyze that too?

Thank you.

-- 
Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>
